channel.title: 888 Number Check — Phone Number Verification Blog
channel.description: Real-time phone number verification tips, guides, and tool updates. WhatsApp detection, Telegram checking, bulk validation, and SMS marketing insights.

item.title: Introducing the Ultimate Guide to Phone Number Verification — 2026 Complete Resource
item.description: Everything marketers, developers, and sales teams need to know about validating phone numbers in 2026. Covers WhatsApp detection, Telegram checking, bulk validation, API integration, SMS marketing list cleaning, and number format guides.

item.title: Free Telegram Number Checker — New Tool Launched
item.description: New free tool to check if a phone number is registered on Telegram. Verify Telegram account status with near-100% accuracy through official interfaces.

item.title: Free Phone Number Verification Checklist — 15-Step Downloadable Resource
item.description: Print-ready 15-step checklist covering format validation, WhatsApp and Telegram detection, bulk processing, and SMS list cleaning. Free to download and share.

item.title: International SMS Marketing Guide — Complete Strategy for 2026
item.description: Complete international SMS marketing strategy covering regulations, country-specific best practices, carrier compliance, and number validation for global campaigns.

item.title: Phone Number Verification API Integration Guide for Developers
item.description: Complete developer guide for integrating phone number verification APIs. RESTful endpoints with SDK support for Python, Node.js, PHP, and Go.

item.title: How to Clean a Phone Number List for Marketing — Complete 8-Step Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to cleaning phone number marketing lists. Remove duplicates, normalize to E.164 format, validate country codes, and run bulk verification.

item.title: How to Verify WhatsApp Numbers in Bulk — Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Complete bulk WhatsApp number verification guide. Check 100K+ numbers in under 5 minutes with 99% accuracy. CSV upload, API batch processing, and result classification.

item.title: Phone Number Format Guide — 50+ Countries with Dialing Codes & Examples
item.description: Complete country-by-country phone number format guide. E.164 standards, dialing codes, expected digit lengths, and formatting examples for 50+ countries.

item.title: Why Phone Numbers Go Inactive — Causes & Solutions
item.description: 20-30% of phone numbers go inactive each year. Learn the causes: churn, carrier deactivation, number recycling, regional migration, and temporary numbers.
